title: lindsaea decrescens
intro: Lindsaea decrescens, also known as the lesser chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lindsaea decrescens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
